PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-07-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel, via Zoom, for and with Rafael Lopez, Petitioner; Marco Acosta, via Zoom, for and with Rogelio Lopez, Objector.

The court confirms with Mr. Wrobel that the Estate's real property is titled under the decedent. The court mentions the adverse possession doctrine and that in the court's view, there is no reason not to appoint Rafael Lopez. Mr. Acosta states that if the court is inclined to appoint Rafael as Administrator, the court order a full bond. Mr. Wrobel reports that his client is ready to post a full bond. The court confirms that the estimated value of the Estate's real property is $1.41 million. The court confirms with Mr. Wrobel that he does not anticipate his client proceeding with filing an unlawful detainer action. The court advises counsel that if there are any issues regarding the real property, the parties will likely need to seek relief in the civil department. Mr. Acosta reports that his client intends to file a quiet title action in the civil department. The court orders the parties to meet and confer regarding the possible quiet title claim before the petition is filed in civil.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission. The court advises of its intent to appoint Rafael Lopez as Administrator with full bond.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Continued To Nov-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
